leadText: Attack Order (Japanese: こうげきしれい Attack Order) is a damage-dealing Bug-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is one of the signature moves of Vespiquen, alongside Defend Order and Heal Order.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Attack Order deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. Attack Order can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , with the user gaining extra three appeal points if the move Focus Energy was used in the prior turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user calls out its underlings to pummel the foe. It has a high critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. Critical hits land more easily. S V The user calls out its underlings to pummel the target. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Inflicts damage on all enemies in the room. It has a high critical-hit rate. * B S L おなじへやの てきポケモンに ダメージをあたえる きゅうしょに あたりやすい MD GtI UNUSED S MD It damages enemies in the same room. It has a high critical-hit rate.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Attack Order in Professor Oak's Big Pokémon Encyclopedia While Attack Order has never made a proper animated series debut , it was used by a Vespiquen in the Professor Oak's Big Pokémon Encyclopedia segment for DP047 .
